violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. The certified manager on record is no longer with the establishment. There was no certificate for a new certified manager.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the ice machine was empty.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of cups were stored on the floor by the electrical panels.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. The hand sink by the ice machine did not have soap available.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
